experiment: A/B code review: standard review vs codetopo-augmented review
methodology: For each repo, Pass A reads source and reviews against P1-P7 principles manually. Pass B uses pre-computed codetopo findings mapped to same principles. Compare what each caught.

pass_a.details: 4 copy-paste endpoint handlers (analyze_email/ip/domain/crypto L210-248), dispatch function doing too much (P4), nested if/elif instead of dict lookup (P5)

pass_b.details: 3 statement_multitask on result/data/response fan-out. No structural_duplication because endpoint handlers normalize to <4 nodes (below min_duplicate_size)

Have-I-Been-Rekt.only_a: 4 copy-paste endpoints (too small for codetopo), dispatch pattern smell
Have-I-Been-Rekt.only_b: 3 fan-out findings (debatable value — normal API patterns)

pass_a.details: _openrouter_stream ≅ _ollama_stream (P2), chat_stream is 900+ lines god function (P4/P7), nested try/except chains (P5)

pass_b.details: 6 structural_duplication pairs among endpoint handlers. 8 bridge_bottleneck, 4 abstraction_bloat warnings

fud-buddy.only_a: 900-line god function (P4/P7), stream handler duplication pattern
fud-buddy.only_b: 4 additional duplication pairs not manually spotted
fud-buddy.overlap: both found structural duplication as primary issue

pass_a.details: routes.py endpoints do DB+formatting+error inline (P4), hidden __import__('threading') dependency (P6)

pass_b.details: 6 isolated_component, 2 bridge_bottleneck, 1 abstraction_bloat — all advisory noise

summary.conclusion: Neither approach dominates. Pass A catches responsibility/scope issues (P4, P5, P6, P7) that graph topology cannot see. Pass B catches structural duplication exhaustively across all function pairs but misses small functions and has no concept of function responsibility. Combined approach is strictly better than either alone.

improvements_identified: Lower min_duplicate_size from 4 to 3 to catch small API endpoint copy-paste
Add P4 check: function complexity metric (node count per function subgraph)
Add P7 check: function coupling metric (how many other functions depend on this one)
Update /review skill to explicitly note codetopo blind spots and require manual P4/P7 review
